name: USA Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: USA Pawn & Jewelry is a pawn shop in Phoenix, AZ offering collateral-based loans, gold/jewelry buying, retail resale, and flexible payment options on pre-owned merchandise.
description_long:
USA Pawn & Jewelry operates as a traditional pawn shop located at 3046 North 16th Street in Phoenix, Arizona. The business functions as a multi-service financial and retail operation serving customers seeking quick cash or affordable merchandise.

The company offers several core services: pawn loans (borrowing against collateral in decent working condition), gold and diamond jewelry buying, retail sales of pre-owned brand-name merchandise at 25-70% discounts, layaway options with 10% down payments, third-party installment payment plans (up to 12+ months), and specialty services including firearm sales and auto loans. They also provide an online shop, instant quote tool for electronics valuation, and a rewards program (EZ+) for customers managing pawns and layaways.

USA Pawn & Jewelry distinguishes itself through daily inventory turnover, brand-name merchandise focus (Samsung, Apple, etc.), expert precious metals testing for fair pricing, product and jewelry protection plans, and multiple payment flexibility options. Their store hours extend to 7 PM weekdays and Saturdays, with Sunday availability until 5 PM, positioning them as accessible to working customers. The EZ+ Rewards Program allows online management of transactions, though Arizona residents cannot make online payments.

As a pawn shop, this business is best suited for consumers needing immediate cash against items of value, those seeking discounted pre-owned electronics and jewelry, or customers preferring collateral-based borrowing over unsecured personal loans. The main caveat is that pawn transactions involve interest, fees, and potential loss of collateral if loans aren't repaid—making this a higher-cost financial option compared to traditional lending.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Expert precious metals testing ensures fair and accurate pricing on gold and diamond jewelry purchases
Instant Quote online tool provides real-time item valuations for electronics before visiting the store
Significant retail discounts (25-70% off retail) on thousands of pre-owned brand-name items like Samsung and Apple products
Flexible payment options including layaway (10% down with monthly payments) and third-party installment plans up to 12+ months
Extended store hours (9 AM-7 PM weekdays/Saturdays, 12 PM-5 PM Sundays) provide accessibility for working customers
EZ+ Rewards Program allows remote management of pawns, layaways, and payments with earning and redemption capability
Multiple collateral categories accepted including jewelry, electronics, tools, gaming, musical instruments, firearms, and handbags
cons: Pawn loans carry interest and fees that are not transparently listed on the website—customers must visit in-person for terms
Online payments not available in Arizona (the store's home state), limiting digital transaction convenience for local customers
All inventory is pre-owned, limiting customer choice if new products are preferred
Collateral-based borrowing carries risk of losing items if loans cannot be repaid within agreed terms
No mention of APR, loan terms, or fee schedules on the website—lack of upfront pricing transparency typical of pawn shops
best_for: Consumers with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, tools) needing immediate cash without credit checks
Budget-conscious shoppers seeking 25-70% discounts on brand-name pre-owned electronics and accessories
Customers preferring collateral-based loans over unsecured personal loans or credit-dependent financing
Individuals shopping for jewelry protection plans or product warranties on electronics
diagnosis: USA Pawn & Jewelry is best for individuals with valuable collateral seeking immediate cash or budget shoppers wanting steep discounts on pre-owned electronics and jewelry. The critical caveat is that pawn loans involve undisclosed fees and interest rates, creating ongoing borrowing costs that make this a last-resort financing option rather than a competitive alternative to personal loans or credit-based lending.
services: Gold and diamond jewelry buying and evaluation
Retail sales of pre-owned brand-name merchandise (electronics, jewelry, tools, fashion, gaming)
Layaway purchases (10% down with monthly payments)
Third-party installment payment plans (up to 12+ months, subject to credit eligibility)
Online shop with daily inventory updates
Instant Quote valuation tool for electronics
Jewelry VIP Protection Plan (guaranteed loan amounts, 100% trade-up value, free cleaning)
Product Protection Plan (extended coverage on electronics and merchandise)
EZ+ Rewards Program (online account management, points earning, transaction management)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
